name: MSC-derived extracellular vesicles
summary: MSC-derived extracellular vesicles are normalized for mouse aging evidence in extracellular-vesicle and secretome therapy.
mechanism_summary: Delivers extracellular vesicles from mesenchymal stromal cells to test paracrine repair, inflammation, and tissue-maintenance signals in aging models.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: MSC extracellular vesicles extended healthspan in mouse aging models; MSC extracellular vesicles in mouse aging models.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
